name: Urban Farmers' Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

Products.value: Art, handmade crafts, antiques, clothing, jewelry, home decor, and other unique treasures from local artists and small businesses

notes: On-file website http://urbanmarketdenver.com/ is a live frameset that forwards to the operator's page at coloradoevents.org/urbanmarket (Colorado Events, Boulder CO) - kept as the true official source rather than a dead/wrong lead. Note this is an arts/crafts/antiques open-air market, not a produce farmers market despite the directory name; product list reflects that. Per the current official schedule the market now runs at Union Station/Wynkoop Plaza, whereas the on-file address is 16th St. Mall and Arapahoe (Skyline Park) - third-party aggregators (farmersstand.com, eatwellguide.org) still list the old Skyline Park address, so the market appears to have relocated; did not overwrite Address since no precise street number was stated on the official page and it's unclear which era is current. Found a Facebook page (facebook.com/urbanmktdenver) that appears related but could not confirm its content/authenticity, so Facebook was omitted rather than guessed. No SNAP, ADA accessibility, or Certified Organic info found on official sources.
